# Plan 04-05: Strip `// generated by spin` markers (D-12)

## What was done

Executed manually after the auto-executor hit the weekly 429 limit. The bulk of
the work — stripping the marker lines from 26 `.tmpl` files — was already
complete from an earlier refactor (commit `8d40c2b` "refactor: strip plan-anchor
comments from source + tests"). The test loop was still asserting the marker was
present, so this plan closed that loop by flipping the assertions.

## Commits

| Hash | Subject |
|------|---------|
| `00e870a` | test(04-05): assert no AUTOGENERATED markers per D-12 strip |

## Files changed

- `internal/scaffold/agents_test.go` — `TestAGENTSmd_MarkerOnLine1` →
  `TestAGENTSmd_NoMarkerOnLine1`. Now asserts the rendered `AGENTS.md` does
  NOT begin with `<!-- AUTOGENERATED by spin 1.2.3 -->`.
- `internal/scaffold/integration_test.go` — `assertAGENTSmd` helper. Dropped
  the prefix-match assertion that required the marker; replaced with a negative
  assertion that the marker must NOT appear on line 1.

## Files NOT changed (already clean)

The 26 `.tmpl` files listed in `04-CONTEXT.md` "Templates to strip" are all
clean. Verified by:

```sh
find internal/scaffold/templates/ -name '*.tmpl' \
  -exec grep -lE 'generated by spin|AUTOGENERATED by spin' {} \;
# (no output)
```

The "owned-by-spin" signal concept is retired per CONTEXT D-12.

## Verification

- `go test ./internal/scaffold/... -count=1 -run 'TestAGENTSmd|assertAGENTSmd'` — PASS
- `go test ./internal/scaffold/... -count=1` — PASS (87.4s, full suite)
- `go build ./...` — clean
- `go vet ./...` — clean

## Deviations from plan

- The 26 `.tmpl` files were already stripped before this plan ran (the prior
  `8d40c2b` refactor covered it). This plan's commit only flips the 2 test
  assertions, which is the only remaining work. Plan's stated file count
  (28 = 26 .tmpl + 2 test files) → 2 modified (tests only), 0 stripped.
- `SpinVer` template var is still defined on the `Project` struct (other tests
  reference it). Leaving it in place is the conservative choice; the test
  suite still compiles and passes.

## CONTEXT coverage

- D-12: ✓ — owned-by-spin signal retired; markers stripped from templates and
  the test loop now requires their absence.
